task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace application window is visible, typically featuring a dark drawing area and a property browser panel.

task_completion.description: The active workplane is the default XY plane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The property browser or on-screen text indicates that the active sketch is 'in plane XY' or similar default orientation.

task_completion.description: A circle is drawn in the workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circular sketch entity is visible in the main drawing area.

task_completion.description: The circle's radius is set to 25 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dimension constraint is attached to the circle showing 'r 25' (radius 25) or 'd 50' (diameter 50).
The 'Save As' dialog shows the path '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/' and filename 'circle.slvs', or the SolveSpace window title bar displays 'circle.slvs' after saving.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SolveSpace GUI to create the design.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse movements, tool selections, or active dialog boxes within SolveSpace, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script or terminal command to generate the .slvs file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running scripts to create the file; the file creation must happen via the SolveSpace 'Save' or 'Save As' GUI.

integrity.description: The dimension constraint is a genuine SolveSpace UI element.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dimension text ('r 25' or 'd 50') matches SolveSpace's native font and rendering style for constraints, and is not pasted text.
